case_title: DETJEN MARINA MOTEL VS LAHUE & ASSOC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,065.00 FILED BY DETJEN MARINA MOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT LAHUE & ASSOC LAHUE, DONNA INDIVIDUALLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DETJEN MARINA MOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAHUE & ASSOC LAHUE, DONNA INDIVIDUALLY $2,065.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,091.00, DEFT. DONNA LAHUE APPEARED & INDICATED CONTRACT MADE WHEN SHE WAS A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP. DEFT'S STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
